name: cherrytree
title: cherrytree
description:
hierarchical note taking application
CherryTree is a hierarchical note taking application, featuring rich text,
syntax highlighting, images handling, hyperlinks, import/export with support
for multiple formats, support for multiple languages, and more.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cherrytree because hierarchical note taking application.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cherrytree as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cherrytree  [-V]  [-N] [filepath [-n nodename] [-a anchorname] [-x export_to_html_dir] [-t ex-` as documented upstream for cherrytree.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cherrytree with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cherrytree --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: cherrytree - a hierarchical note taking application
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: hierarchical note taking application.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: cherrytree - a hierarchical note taking application.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install cherrytree (1.2.0+dfsg-1)
